evals.prompt: I'm in a Next.js app with shadcn already set up. Install the 8StarLabs heatmap component and show me the right registry command plus any setup details I should double-check.
evals.expected_output: Provides the direct registry install flow, keeps the answer grounded in Next.js plus shadcn assumptions, and avoids maintainer-only repo internals.

evals.prompt: Which 8StarLabs component should I use for a compact transit line plus station label in a dashboard card? I also want the MCP-friendly registry name if there's one.
evals.expected_output: Recommends `transport-badge`, explains why, and includes the `@8starlabs/...` registry path or equivalent MCP-oriented guidance.

evals.prompt: My assistant can talk to the shadcn MCP server. How should I configure my project so it can install 8StarLabs components by name instead of raw URLs?
evals.expected_output: Explains the `components.json` registry entry and keeps MCP as an accelerator rather than the only supported path.
